content: Tom racconta le barzellette in maniera terribile perché spesso dimentica la battuta finale.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Guybrush88 (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: eng:Tom is a terrible joke teller, because he often forgets the punchline
eng:Tom's a terrible joke teller, because he often forgets the punchline
